national_identity.description: Saudi engineer, project leader, and inventor contributing to engineering innovation and industrial technologies.

education_initiative.description: When bridging programs were suspended in Saudi technical colleges, Tariq Al-Khathami took the initiative to communicate with Bahrain Polytechnic and contributed to enabling a pathway for diploma graduates to continue their studies in chemical engineering.
education_initiative.impact: The initiative helped many Saudi students continue their academic path toward engineering degrees.

granted: Systems and Processes for Chemical Processing
filed: Blinding Plug Actuation System and Related Systems and Methods
Bypassing a Portion of a Pipeline
Methods and Systems for Eroding and Preventing Deposits Within Vessels
System for Determining Conditions Within a Pipeline
System for Determining Degradation Conditions Within a Pipeline

community_impact.description: Through his academic and innovation activities, Tariq Al-Khathami has contributed to spreading the culture of innovation and invention among peers and young engineers.

social_influence.description: Tariq Al-Khathami maintains a professional audience of thousands of followers interested in innovation, engineering, and technology.

tribal_identity.description: Belongs to the historic Khath'am tribe and is regarded as a contemporary figure appreciated for his engineering achievements and innovation.

positioning.description: A rising Saudi inventor combining engineering leadership, academic initiative, and technological innovation.
